title: oxytropis baicalia
intro: Oxytropis baicalia, also known as the Baical oxytropis or Baical locoweed, is a type of perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Oxytropis baicalia include its ability to help lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Oxytropis baicalia is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its dried root and flower are used to make herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
